The '''''Razor''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. The corvette was captured by the Motivator while it was trying to escape with the Death Star II construction data onboard, resulting inside the Motivator's hangar bay crashing on the surface of planet Kothlis.

==History==
[[File:ExecutorXWA6.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Razor'' rushes to complete the transfer of the Death Star plans while the ''Executor'' bears down]]
{{Quote|Wedge, an Imperial Cruiser! It's captured the Razor!|Rebel pilot to Wedge Antilles|<ref name="RS II" />}}
After secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star II plans|data]] was stolen from the freighter ''[[Suprosa]]'', in [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]],<ref name="NEC" /> the information was taken to members of the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], and then transferred to the ''Razor'' when the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] base ''[[Kothlis II]]'', came under attack from Imperial forces. Covered by the fire of [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']], ''Razor'' entered hyperspace to rendezvous with the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']].<ref name="XWA">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>

On its way, however, the corvette was ambushed and disabled by a flight of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. The [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] arrived and caught the corvette in a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], but not before the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Mercury (Dreadnaught-class)|''Mercury'']] showed up in the field to assist. The corvette then launched [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] [[V33-1XP]] from the ''Razor'' containing a lone crew member managing to escape with the data, which was received by the friendly civilians.

Following a furious battle between Imperial and Alliance forces, the Rebels managed to retrieve the secret information and escape. Unfortunately, the ship and the rest of its crew became prisoners of the Empire.

The corvette was captured by the [[Motivator (Imperial-class)|''Motivator'']], but [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and the frigate [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']] [[Battle of Kothlis|arrived]] to recover the data. Although [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and the other Rogues managed to destroy the ''Motivator,'' ''Razor'' had been drawn into its hangar bay and joined the Star Destroyer in its out-of-control plunge to the surface of Kothlis. [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and a group of [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] joined the Rogues in reaching the crashed starship and recovered the stolen data before the ''Motivator's'' reactor exploded.

==Behind the scenes==
''Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader'' and ''X-wing Alliance'' portray different outcomes as to the ''Razor''{{'s}} fate. While ''X-wing Alliance'' shows the ''Razor'' leaving the [[Battle of Kothlis]], ''Rogue Leader'' shows the destruction of the ''Razor'' and its captor, the [[Motivator (Imperial-class)|''Motivator'']] (not ''Avenger''), upon the latter's crash-landing on Kothlis.

There has not been an official retcon to reconcile this, but it's possible that ''Razor'' was a group of at least two Corvettes, and each game shows the fate of each one.

The fate of the ''Razor'', which was carrying top secret data, pursued by a Star Destroyer and captured by its tractor beam, then ejecting the plans in an escape pod, is nearly identical to that of [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] and the opening scenes of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']].
